vocab.meaning: cơ sở vật chất hiện đại bậc nhất
vocab.example: The school has invested heavily in state-of-the-art facilities, including a fully equipped robotics lab and a 3D printing studio.

vocab.meaning: sự phát triển toàn diện (thể chất, trí tuệ, tâm hồn)
vocab.example: The focus has shifted from rote memorization toward the holistic development of students through extracurricular activities.

vocab.meaning: sự số hóa việc học tập
vocab.example: The complete digitization of learning means that students now carry tablets instead of heavy stacks of textbooks.
There has been a radical change in the pedagogical approach, moving away from teacher-centered lectures to student-led discussions.

vocab.meaning: môi trường hòa nhập (hỗ trợ mọi đối tượng học sinh)
vocab.example: The school has become a much more inclusive environment, providing specialized support for students with diverse learning needs.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng về mặt kiến trúc/xây dựng
vocab.example: Due to a growing population, the school has undergone significant architectural expansion, adding two new wings and a modern gymnasium.

vocab.meaning: việc lồng ghép các kỹ năng mềm
vocab.example: The new curriculum emphasizes soft skills integration, teaching students emotional intelligence and public speaking from an early age.

vocab.meaning: các giao thức/quy định an ninh
vocab.example: Security protocols have been tightened immensely, with biometric scanners and CCTV cameras installed throughout the premises.
In contrast to my time, the school now offers excellent vocational orientation to help seniors choose the right career path.

vocab.meaning: các sáng kiến về phát triển bền vững
vocab.example: The introduction of sustainability initiatives, like solar panels and recycling programs, has turned the school into a green model.
